description_long: This office building features a modern, rectilinear facade with large blue-tinted windows arranged in a regular grid pattern. The front elevation displays a mix of arched and rectangular window bays, with some recessed sections and a prominent ground-level entrance. The roof is flat and includes several skylights and rooftop terraces, some with greenery. The side and rear elevations are mostly solid, with minimal fenestration and a few small windows or access points. The building is predominantly white, accented by blue glass and subtle green landscaping elements. Its overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for a commercial urban environment.
description: A modern, white office building with large blue-tinted windows, flat roof, and rooftop terraces, featuring a mix of arched and rectangular window bays.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large blue windows, and a combination of arched and rectangular window bays.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly solid white walls, minimal windows, and visible rooftop skylights and terraces.
description_view_2: Rear/side view highlighting additional window patterns, rooftop greenery, and a large black-framed window.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a long, mostly solid white wall and a few small windows and rooftop features.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, vertically aligned rectangular and arched windows in a grid pattern, with some recessed sections and grouped bays.
